_notes.model_size: Int8-quantized ONNX (model_quantized.onnx) is ~6.6 MB. Replaces the prior BiRefNet-lite fp16 build (114 MB) which exceeded the 8 GB-host WASM EP RAM budget and exceeded Playwright Chromium's WebGPU storage-buffer cap.
_notes.ort_version: Tied to onnxruntime-web 1.26.0-dev.20260416-b7804b056c (the version pinned by @huggingface/transformers 4.2.0). If transformers.js bumps, regenerate these wasm sha256 values.
_notes.pipeline: Loadable via pipeline('image-segmentation', 'bg-remove', { dtype: 'q8' }). transformers.js's q8 dtype maps suffix '_quantized', resolving to onnx/model_quantized.onnx. Upstream config.json declares dtype 'fp32', so the override is required to avoid 404s under env.allowRemoteModels=false.
